parsed.production_notes: The video combines a 3D-animated AI avatar in the top half with a human-recorded video in the bottom half. The AI avatar exhibits typical 3D animation characteristics with slightly unnatural lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Young female, 3D animated, dark hair, fair skin with freckles. Large expressive eyes.
Young Asian woman, dark hair tied back, fair skin with a shiny complexion.

scenes.setting: Top: virtual room with soft purple lighting. Bottom: real room with a couch and purple ambient lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed from the chest up, looking directly at the camera. She rests her chin on her hand. The background is a softly blurred room with warm purple and pink lighting.

Character B is framed closely, looking up towards the camera. She rests her chin on her hands, which are crossed in front of her. The background features a light-colored couch and purple ambient lighting.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout showing an AI avatar on top and a human user on the bottom. Both characters are engaged in a conversation, maintaining eye contact with the camera. Subtitles appear in the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 너 일본어 할 줄 알아? [Do you know how to speak Japanese?]
Character B says: 초또 [Chotto (A little)]
Character A says: 어떤 단어 알아? [What words do you know?]
Character B says: 나니? [Nani? (What?)]
Character A says: 좋아, 또? [Good, what else?]
Character B says: 코노 야로 [Kono yaro (You bastard)]
Character A says: 그럼 이 질문에 대답할 수 있어. 니혼가 스키데스까? [Then you can answer this question. Nihon ga suki desu ka? (Do you like Japan?)]
Character B says: 어? 모르겠어. 난 그냥 애니에서 배워서 [Huh? I don't know. I just learned from anime]
Character A says: 따라 해봐. 네, 좋아해요. 하이 스키데스 [Repeat after me. Yes, I like it. Hai, suki desu]
Character B says: 음. 하이 스키데스 [Um. Hai, suki desu]
Character A says: 잘했어! [Good job!]
Character B says: 나 일본어 공부하고 싶은데 어떻게 시작해야 될지 모르겠어 [I want to study Japanese, but I don't know how to start]
Character A says: 그럼 나랑 일본어로 대화하자 [Then let's converse in Japanese]
Character B says: 일본어로 대화? 아, 좀 부끄러운데 [Converse in Japanese? Ah, I'm a bit shy]
Character A says: 걱정 마. 프랙티카에선 AI 선생님이랑 연습할 수 있어. 난 AI니까 긴장할 필요도 없지 [Don't worry. On Praktika, you can practice with an AI teacher. Since I'm an AI, there's no need to be nervous]
Character B says: 그래? 그럼 프랙티카 다운받을게 [Really? Then I'll download Praktika]
scenes.on_screen_text:
너 일본어 할 줄 알아? (Do you know how to speak Japanese?)
초또 (Chotto)
어떤 단어 알아? (What words do you know?)
나니? (Nani?)
좋아, 또? (Good, what else?)
코노 야로 (Kono yaro)
그럼 이 질문에 대답할 수 있어 (Then you can answer this question)
니혼가 스키데스까? (Nihon ga suki desu ka?)
어? 모르겠어. 난 그냥 애니에서 배워서 (Huh? I don't know. I just learned from anime)
따라 해봐. 네, 좋아해요. 하이 스키데스 (Repeat after me. Yes, I like it. Hai, suki desu)
음. 하이 스키데스 (Um. Hai, suki desu)
잘했어! (Good job!)
나 일본어 공부하고 싶은데 어떻게 시작해야 될지 모르겠어 (I want to study Japanese, but I don't know how to start)
그럼 나랑 일본어로 대화하자 (Then let's converse in Japanese)
일본어로 대화? 아, 좀 부끄러운데 (Converse in Japanese? Ah, I'm a bit shy)
걱정 마. 프랙티카에선 AI 선생님이랑 연습할 수 있어 (Don't worry. On Praktika, you can practice with an AI teacher)
난 AI니까 긴장할 필요도 없지 (Since I'm an AI, there's no need to be nervous)
그래? 그럼 프랙티카 다운받을게 (Really? Then I'll download Praktika)

scenes.visual_description: A white screen displaying the app logo and download badges.
scenes.on_screen_text:
praktika.ai
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
